creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
What about merging relevant hunk from wesnoth-devel?
I think it's more cleaner this way.

--- wesnoth.diff begins here ---
Index: games/wesnoth/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/csup/ports/games/wesnoth/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.73
diff -u -p -r1.73 Makefile
--- games/wesnoth/Makefile	15 Sep 2009 13:43:35 -0000	1.73
+++ games/wesnoth/Makefile	22 Sep 2009 15:11:24 -0000
@@ -63,6 +63,11 @@ PLIST_FILES+=	man/${manlang}/man6/wesnot
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-debug
 .endif
 
+# XXX: breaks compilation because of -Werror
+.if !defined(WITH_STRICT)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-strict-compilation
+.endif
+
 .if defined(WITHOUT_CAMPAIGN)
 PLIST_SUB+=		CAMPAIGN="@comment "
 .else
--- wesnoth.diff ends here ---
